no explanation of how things work
You kinda have to know from the start before jumping into it
They do explain if you takes time to read effects descriptions
What they don't do however is a tutorial
I wish they had a tutorial
but there's not much regarding how some characters work
Well beside some obvious ones like Ramona giving u airth similar to her rouse and Mouchette being entirely strike based

Such as doresain being pure garbage in story
But being really good in pvp

This is the reason why you go tinct

But hey, gotta make money somehow

You go with any character in the collection section
There is a button at the bottom saying trial
You go in there to test stuffs out

She is good for cleanse, stagnation, dispel
But she is full support so don't expect her to deal dmg

ping me for password match, and traphase trades

Honestly it feels like a nam flashback, cause waaay back when I used to play Overwatch, people universally hated burst damage (unless it's their fav character <:S_threat:1400771719404196010> )- cause it's always meta. Dealing huge damage or causing a lot of damage in short period of time - that's the universal meta everywhere. Doesn't matter - card game, hero shooter, or Slay-the-Spire-like Gacha

And like there is nothing wrong with it in when it used in moderation and offset by some disadvantage it puts you on - it helps the game's tempo not to bog down and become a slug fest. But the last days of Traphase, I rarely see anything else besides the "exalt and do shit ton of damages" comps

And like there is barely any counterplay options to that, cause what te heck you gonna when your entire team is dead or in a very bad spot.
And the worst thing is that you either have to make "Panzer" comps where you just spam shields and barrier or just do the same shit and pray your RNG is better than theirs or they make more mistakes than you
Welcome to horrible rng gacha game pvp
I played until dominator and stopped because I already knew what would be beyond that is going to be absolute cancer
